channel.title: CyberNetSec - Cyberattack
channel.description: Latest cyberattack threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: cPanel Zero-Day Auth Bypass (CVE-2026-41940) Actively Exploited for Months Before Patch
item.description:
A critical authentication bypass vulnerability, CVE-2026-41940, in the widely used cPanel & WHM web hosting platform was actively exploited as a zero-day for at least two months before a patch was released. The flaw, which has a CVSS score of 9.8, allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to gain fu...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Cyberattack, Patch Management

Read Full Article →

item.title: New Stealthy Python Backdoor 'DEEP#DOOR' Steals Credentials Using Legitimate Tunneling Service
item.description:
Security researchers from Securonix have discovered a sophisticated, multi-stage Python backdoor named DEEP#DOOR. The malware operates as a full-featured Remote Access Trojan (RAT), beginning with an obfuscated batch script that embeds the Python payload. It disables Windows security controls, estab...

Severity: High

Categories: Malware, Threat Intelligence, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: China-Based Silver Fox APT Expands Espionage Campaign Across Asia with Fake Tax Audits
item.description:
The China-based threat group Silver Fox has launched a new wave of attacks targeting businesses and individuals across Asia. The group, which has been active since at least 2022, uses fake tax audit notifications and counterfeit software update alerts to deliver malware. According to analysis by S2W...

Severity: High

Categories: Threat Actor, Cyberattack, Phishing

Read Full Article →

item.title: Germany Accuses Russia of Orchestrating Large-Scale Signal Phishing Attack on Politicians
item.description:
The German government has officially stated its belief that Russia was behind a widespread and sophisticated phishing campaign targeting the Signal messenger accounts of hundreds of high-profile individuals. The targets included Members of Parliament, government officials, diplomats, and journalists...

Severity: High

Categories: Phishing, Cyberattack, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →

item.title: Checkmarx Details Supply Chain Attack Stemming from Trivy Scanner Vulnerability
item.description:
Application security firm Checkmarx has provided a detailed timeline of a supply chain attack that began with the exploitation of a vulnerability in the Trivy scanner. The attack, which started on March 23, 2026, led to unauthorized access to Checkmarx's GitHub environment. Attackers published malic...

Severity: High

Categories: Supply Chain Attack, Data Breach, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Wisconsin Hospital Mile Bluff Medical Center Hit by Ransomware, Enters Downtime Procedures
item.description:
Mile Bluff Medical Center in Mauston, Wisconsin, has confirmed it is recovering from a ransomware attack that occurred in April 2026. The attack encrypted files on the medical center's network, causing temporary disruptions to computer and phone systems. Clinical teams were forced to revert to estab...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Data Breach, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: CISA Discovers 'FIRESTARTER' Backdoor on Federal Cisco Firewall; Malware Survives Patches
item.description:
The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has disclosed that a Cisco Firepower device at an unnamed federal agency was compromised with a new, sophisticated backdoor named FIRESTARTER. An Advanced Persistent Threat (APT) actor exploited two critical vulnerabilities, CVE-2025-2...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Malware, Vulnerability, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Utility Tech Giant Itron Discloses Breach of Internal IT Network
item.description:
Itron, a major American technology provider for energy and water utilities, has disclosed a cybersecurity incident in an SEC filing. The company reported on April 13, 2026, that an unauthorized third party had gained access to a segment of its internal IT systems. Upon discovery, Itron activated its...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Cyberattack, Data Breach, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Adobe Scrambles to Patch Critical, Actively Exploited RCE Flaw in Commerce and Magento
item.description:
Adobe has released an emergency, out-of-band security update for a critical remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability, CVE-2026-11234, affecting Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source. The flaw, which has a CVSS score of 9.8, is being actively exploited in the wild. An unauthenticated attacker can e...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Patch Management, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Global Wings Airline Breach Exposes Personal Data of 5 Million Passengers via Third-Party Vendor
item.description:
Global Wings Airline has disclosed a major data breach affecting approximately 5 million of its passengers. The breach originated not within the airline's own systems, but from a third-party service provider responsible for managing the 'SkyMiles' loyalty program database. The exposed data includes ...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Supply Chain Attack, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →
